name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum addressing AI-specific terms such as use of AI in service delivery, training data rights, and AI-generated output ownership.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) between covered entities and business associates.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard agreement for cloud/SaaS service subscriptions covering access rights, payment terms, data handling, warranties, and liability.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Agreement for GDPR and privacy law compliance governing how a data processor handles personal data on behalf of a data controller.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early-stage design partnerships where a vendor provides pre-release or beta software/services in exchange for feedback and collaboration.

name: Mutual NDA
description: Standard terms for a Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement governing the bilateral exchange and protection of confidential information.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page with deal-specific terms (parties, effective date, term) that pairs with the Mutual NDA standard terms.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Agreement for professional/consulting services covering scope of work, deliverables, payment, intellectual property, and liability.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Agreement for technology or business partnerships covering collaboration terms, co-marketing, revenue sharing, and integration commitments.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Agreement for time-limited pilot/trial engagements where a customer evaluates a vendor's product before a full commercial commitment.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Agreement defining uptime commitments, performance metrics, measurement methodology, and service credit remedies.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Agreement for on-premise or self-hosted software licensing covering license grants, delivery, support, maintenance, and IP terms.
